---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or Need

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the need it addresses. Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## User Role

Which role(s) would use this feature?
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Staff
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Student

## Module

Which module does this relate to?
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Buildings & Rooms
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Incident Reports
- [ ] Maintenance Requests
- [ ] Announcements & Notifications
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] New Module

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
